pilot_phase.purpose: Validate codebase correctness, verify CSI/AIS metric differentiation, quick CWD effective-lambda test, and soft CWD proximal convergence check
kill_criteria: AdamW baseline < 91% on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 at 100 epochs → codebase bug, must fix before proceeding
CSI values identical (CV < 5%) across all 4 pilot methods → metric is degenerate, redesign CSI
AIS computation produces NaN or Inf → numerical issue in metric, must fix
CWD mask ratio < 0.1 or > 0.9 → CWD implementation likely incorrect
Soft CWD (beta=100) differs from hard CWD by > 1% accuracy → proximal approximation too crude, may need different approach for H1

go_no_go_decisions.condition: All kill criteria pass; AdamW > 91%; CSI differentiates methods; AIS computable
go_no_go_decisions.fallback: Fix implementation issues and re-run pilots

go_no_go_decisions.condition: CSI values have CV > 10% across methods; AIS differentiates alignment-aware (CWD) from agnostic methods
go_no_go_decisions.fallback: Simplify metrics — fall back to just tracking weight norm CV and effective lambda as proxies

go_no_go_decisions.decision: Proceed with soft CWD for H1
go_no_go_decisions.condition: Soft CWD (beta >= 100) matches hard CWD within 0.2%
go_no_go_decisions.fallback: Acknowledge soft CWD is an approximation; weaken H1 claim to 'approximate proximal interpretation'

pilot_tasks.name: AdamW constant WD baseline
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Test accuracy > 91%; loss monotonically decreasing after epoch 10; no NaN in diagnostics

pilot_tasks.name: CWD (hard binary mask)
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Trains without error; mask ratio ~0.4-0.6; accuracy within ±1% of baseline

pilot_tasks.name: SWD/AdamS (gradient-norm scaling)
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: WD multiplier varies (CV > 0.1); accuracy within ±1% of baseline

pilot_tasks.name: Cosine WD schedule
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Accuracy within ±1.5% of baseline; mean WD computable and approximately 2.5e-4

pilot_tasks.name: CSI/AIS/BEM metric validation
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: CSI values differ by >10% across methods; AIS computable; BEM < 0.01 for budget-equivalent pairs

parallel_wave_2.note: 3 methods in parallel after baseline validates

parallel_wave_3.note: Metrics analysis (no GPU) runs in parallel with soft CWD sweep (1 GPU)
